gtc.app.name: gtc
gtc.arg.add_admin.bundle_ref.help: Repètwa bundle lokal pou mete ajou.
gtc.arg.add_admin.cn.help: Non Komen sètifika kliyan ki otorize pou jwenn aksè ak API admin nan.
gtc.arg.add_admin.name.help: Etikèt admin opsyonèl ki fasil pou moun li.
gtc.arg.add_admin.public_key_file.help: Fichye kle piblik PEM/OpenSSH pou admin sa a.
gtc.arg.admin.tunnel.container.help: Non kontenè andedan tach ECS la.
gtc.arg.admin.tunnel.local_port.help: Pò lokal pou mare pou tinèl admin nan.
gtc.arg.admin.tunnel.target.help: Founisè nwaj pou tinèl admin nan.
gtc.arg.bundle_ref.help: Chemen/ref bundle: chemen lokal, file://, oci://, repo://, store://
gtc.arg.debug_router.help: Enprime binè rezoud la ak agiman yo sou stderr anvan exec.
gtc.arg.deploy_bundle_source.help: Ranplase sous bundle aleka ki pase bay deplwayè nwaj yo (pa egzanp https://.../bundle.gtbundle).
gtc.arg.key.help: Kle otorizasyon pou tenant ki espesifye a.
gtc.arg.locale.help: Lokal UI pou èd/sòti gtc (tag BCP-47).
gtc.arg.remove_admin.bundle_ref.help: Repètwa bundle lokal pou mete ajou.
gtc.arg.remove_admin.cn.help: Non Komen sètifika kliyan pou retire.
gtc.cmd.add_admin.about: Anrejistre yon idantite sètifika kliyan admin pou yon bundle lokal.
gtc.cmd.admin.tunnel.about: Louvri yon tinèl AWS Session Manager pou API admin yon bundle ki deplwaye.
gtc.cmd.doctor.about: Tcheke si binè Greentic obligatwa yo disponib nan PATH.
gtc.cmd.install.about: Enstale zouti Greentic epi, si ou vle, atifak tenant otorize yo.
gtc.cmd.remove_admin.about: Retire yon idantite sètifika kliyan admin nan yon bundle lokal.
gtc.cmd.setup.about: Transmèt bay greentic-setup (jesyon sik lavi pake a).
gtc.cmd.start.about: Kòmanse yon bundle apati yon referans lokal oswa aleka.
gtc.cmd.stop.about: Sispann yon ekzekisyon bundle oswa detwi yon anviwònman ki deplwaye.
gtc.cmd.update.about: Fòse mete ajou tout binè konpayon Greentic yo nan dènye vèsyon 0.4.x la.
gtc.err.bin_missing_setup: greentic-setup pa jwenn nan PATH. Enstale ak: cargo install greentic-setup
gtc.err.install_dir: Echèk pou rezoud repèrtwa enstalasyon yo.
gtc.err.invalid_manifest: Manifest enstalasyon tenant la pa valab.
gtc.err.key_required: Yon kle obligatwa pou enstalasyon tenant.
gtc.install.public_mode: Ap enstale zouti piblik Greentic yo.
gtc.install.summary_failed: Enstalasyon atifak tenant yo fini ak echèk.
gtc.install.summary_ok: Enstalasyon atifak tenant yo fini avèk siksè.
gtc.install.using_env_key: Ap itilize kle tenant ki soti nan varyab anviwònman {env}.
gtc.start.err.admin_certs_failed: echèk pandan preparasyon sètifika admin yo
gtc.start.err.deploy_failed: echèk pandan deplwaman bundle la anvan demaraj
gtc.start.err.target_select_failed: echèk pandan chwa sib deplwaman an
gtc.stop.err.destroy_failed: echèk pandan destriksyon bundle ki deplwaye a
gtc.stop.err.destroy_required: sib ki deplwaye yo egzije kounye a --destroy; sispann san destriksyon poko aplike
gtc.stop.err.runtime_destroy_unsupported: --destroy pa sipòte pou sib runtime la
gtc.stop.err.target_select_failed: echèk pandan chwa sib deplwaman an
gtc.update.binstall_missing: cargo-binstall pa enstale. Kouri `gtc install` an premye.
gtc.update.start: Ap mete ajou binè konpayon Greentic yo.
gtc.update.summary_ok: Tout binè konpayon yo te mete ajou avèk siksè.
gtc.wizard.option.bundle: Konstwi / Mete ajou yon Bundle Pwodiksyon
gtc.wizard.option.pack: Konstwi / Mete ajou yon Pak (flows + konpozan)
gtc.wizard.title: Asistan Devlopè Greentic
